faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: How can I get into Dattakala Group of Institution for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Dattakala Group of Institution has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.
After 10th Diploma Candidate passed 10th class/SSC examination or its equivalent, with at least 35% aggregate marks from any recognised institute/board are eligible to apply.
M.E./M.Tech Sponsored candidate must have minimum of two years of full time work experience in a registered firm/ company/ industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.
MBA/PGDM Candidate must have completed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU.
MCA Candidate must have completed B.C.A/ B.Sc. (Computer Science) /B.Sc (IT) /B.E. (CSE) / B.Tech (CSE) / B.E. (IT) / B.Tech. (IT) or equivalent Degree with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. Or Candidate who have completed any graduation degree B.E./B.Tech/ B.Sc/ B.Com/ B.A. /B.Voc. preferably with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level (with additional bridge Courses as per the norms of the concerned University) with above marks can also apply. Candidates appearing for final year of qualifying examination are also eligible to appear.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good. The college celebrates Indian festivals.

review_content.Placements: This college is good in nature; staff and teachers are helpful, and teaching is good, but placements are poor. The batch of 2024–27 consists of medium-level students. The college placements involve medium-type companies that visit the college for job requirements.
review_content.Infrastructure: My hostel is good; the hostel area is very clean and has a fresh nature. The facilities provided by the hostel include Wi-Fi, hot water, and cultural programs. The hostel has two rectors and 24-hour watchman service. The hostel rules are very strict.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements in 2022 and really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Above 70% of students were placed in our course. The average package offered in our course is 8 Lacs. The recruiting companies for our course are Infosys and TCS.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure in our course is good. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good and the mess, canteen, medical facilities, and sports are good. I also hope you can take admission in this college because its facilities are excellent .
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful, qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is much better; yes, it makes the students industrially ready for company interviews. The semester exam at this college is average; 85% is the pass percentage.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Overall college experience is good.

review_content.Placements: The placements offered by the college are average, with companies like HDFC, Infosys, and HCL hiring through campus drives. The average package offered is 2.2 LPA. In my class, only two students got placed in HDFC and HCL. The college does not provide any internships, and if they do, it is without any stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is surrounded by lush greenery, and Wi-Fi is available in both the laboratory and hostel. The library is well-stocked, and the infrastructure is satisfactory. Hostel rooms are shared, and the food quality is average. There are two canteens available, both of which serve good food. Every Sunday, students organize a sports match where cricket and badminton are played.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It should provide good placements and knowledgeable teachers.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in the colleges, and the placements we get are not worth it. The salary package offered is under 1 lac or close to it. The average student who scores around 80% will not get any placements. Students who score above 90% in academics will get the placements but not much good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available in the computer department, but the network speed is too slow, which makes even searching for something hard. Classrooms are decent. There are not lots of books to read in the library, and the present books are just about study specifics and nothing else than that.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided like scholarships.

review_content.Placements: This college does not offers placement so we need to get placed by walk in campus but nowadays some companies around 2 to 4 small companies are coming in college for recruitment last year 10 students where placed through collegr campus the highest package was 10lpa and the lowest was 2.5LPA, the average is 3.25lpa .
review_content.Infrastructure: In my course there is a good working computer labs with high internet speed and software the staff is helping and supportive, the quality of food available in mess and canteen is average, library is very good we get many books from library for extra studies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good infrastructure and faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The minimum salary package offered was 6 LPA, and the average salary package offered was 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, and DBS. Our college provides few internships to students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are clean. This college does not provide a good Wi-Fi facility. The library is peaceful. Our hostel is not good, so students prefer to reside in a rented apartment.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are the best in our college. They are knowledgeable and explain every topic easily. Our course curriculum is relevant to make students ready for the industry. Our faculty members are helpful. They also use projectors to teach us. It is easy to get admission to this college. Our college is good in terms of education.

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

The Dattakala Group of Institution cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Dattakala Group of Institution BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 288318 and 409954 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Information Technology. The firs

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because it is value for money and the faculty members are very good-natured.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are quite good. The only drawback is that attending classes is compulsory for everyone, or else strict action will be taken against us. There is a good infrastructure. There is a library, which is most important. Our college conducts so many fests and sports days.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very awesome to take admission and enjoy many things like events or faculty teaching.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are the best on campus. The highest speed internet and smart classrooms, like biometric attendance, AC setup, or projectors, are available in my classroom. Many types of sports are played online or offline, the mess food is excellent, and the canteen is super.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is quite decent and the academic faculty members are very good.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good with good facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful, but a few feel useless. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college is quite decent and the academic faculty is very good.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good, providing facilities for the students. The course curriculum is good and covers the concepts well. Some subjects are useful but a few feel outdated. Overall, it provides a decent learning foundation by the faculty members in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Outdated curriculum poor facilities  and weak placement support – not recommended.
reviews.review_text: Department facilities: The labs were outdated and many systems didn’t work properly. WiFi was slow and often unavailable. Classrooms lacked smart boards and were poorly maintained. The library had limited books and outdated material. Hostel & mess: Hostel rooms were congested with poor cleanliness. Washrooms were often dirty. Food in the mess was tasteless repetitive and sometimes unhygienic. Canteen options were very limited.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and supportive faculty, with scope for curriculum improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped computer labs with the latest systems and the highest speed Wi-Fi connectivity available throughout the academic block. Classrooms are spacious, have projectors and smart boards, making lectures more interactive. The central library is well stocked with a variety of technical books and journals.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are currently ruling in college.
reviews.review_text: The college is very good on the basis of some qualities but lacks a lot. Wi-Fi is only available in labs, and the network is not good in the classrooms. Toilets are very hygienic. Classrooms are clean and good. Labs are advanced for only some subjects. The library has only study material, with no novels or other books. Faculty members are very good, friendly, and hardworking, but some teachers are rude and have professional behavior.

reviews.review_heading: My short summary of college.
reviews.review_text: Not luxury, but Sunday food items are available at our canteen. There's a huge hall at the canteen, and almost 200 students can sit at the same time and relish the food. The next big thing would be the Amphitheatre, as it is small but always buzzing. Among everything, the college has taken complete care in providing us with a stationery shop right inside the campus. So, all bases covered, and for our basic needs during college hours, we don't have to step beyond the campus gate.

reviews.review_heading: Best budget engineering college in Bhopal .
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are good, the building for all departments of engineering are in goof condition. Each building includes labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms and library. They also provide hostel which is overall good. The only problem is food, which is not good at all.

reviews.review_heading: NRI institute of technology is a good institute for placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and campus are developed and have very modern facilities. Electronic labs are there with all the available equipment. But the labs have been closed since 8 p.m. The hostel and canteen are there near the institute. The institute offers a bus facility for students. Sport activities will be held every weekend.

reviews.review_heading: My college life is very nice .
reviews.review_text: The college is very nice and building is good. All labs are Wi-Fi enabled. We have an IBM lab and Advanced engineering labs. A college library is there with around 45.000 books of the latest edition. All the books are helpful. Classrooms are smart with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: NRI has high quality infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very well have a very good computer Science labs. Electronic machines is available in labs for practical work. Industry tour provided in every month after passing 3 year. Wi-Fi, labs, library is very good. Canteen food quality is extraordinary. Hostel is some walk away from institution. Sport facility is advanced, some coach is state level coach they provide a top quality training.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Bhopal with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The labs and overall infrastructure are top-notch. Regular labs are taken by faculty members, and coding practices also help students form their development rapidly in their domain field. Our college also encourages students to do extra work on tools and new upcoming technologies.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but placement opportunities are not provided.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Hostels are not good and they don't serve good food. Our college charges less fees but is not a good college for studies. Facilities provided in our college are very good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for financially middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by our campus are not good but also not bad. There are many buildings for different branches. For civil and mechanical branches, there is a separate building which consists of workshops and many laboratories.

highlights.summary: Govind Guru Tribal University was established in the year 2012.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Education - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Don't make mistake to take admission there. It is only wastege of money and time.

review_content.Placements: There was no placement faculty and section. No any offers were came for placements. Students doesn't know about placements of my college. I had never seen any offers came to my college. None of any idea interview conducted because our college never approached to top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: What can I say about infrastructure. I used to laugh after seeing the condition of infrastructure and even there was no book available in English medium. Whenever I had to go college for exams I used to got boken table and benches. No canteen facility available there. I can say that very the worst infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good and provides a good education.

review_content.Placements: About 40% of the students from our course were placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 2.5 lac per month, while the lowest salary offered is Rs. 25,000 per month. Banswara Syntex Ltd and Blue Mount Aqua were the top recruiters for our course. Phatic was the top role offered. The highest salary offered in our course is Rs. 75,000 per month, while the lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month and the average salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. About 30% of the student got internships from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a Wi-Fi facility, labs like chemistry, zoology, botany, etc., and many classrooms. There are many sections in our college, and also it has a huge library and a huge playground, volleyball court, basketball, football and many things. But it does not provide hostel. The canteen serves very good food, and also they provide best medical facility to every student. Our college provides state-level championship and national level championships.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Science (B.Sc.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My college gives good placements, and I will recommend others to take admission in it.

review_content.Placements: The number of students in my college is above 5,000. My course is the best in my field. My college provides good internships. Students have been working in the best companies from the beginning of college. It is a very good college, and I recommend others to take admission in it.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college provides libraries and more good faculty members. Good faculty members are provided by my college to all the students. The condition is very good, and there is a very good environment at the college garden. It will be the best college in my area, and it is very good.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Education - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This is a perfect college for the middle class.

review_content.Placements: When I completed college my final percentage was 58%. The lowest average starts from 12000 and the highest goes up to 2 Lacs. Our college is in a backward area, so there are no big companies here. We have to find a job ourselves after completing our studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are good. There is no Wi-Fi here. There are labs and library here. And there are classrooms for different courses. The college also has a hostel but the condition of the hostel is bad because people from backward caste live in the hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. B.Ed. - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is known for its faculty members and good placements.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs.25,000 per month, the lowest salary was Rs.10,000 per month, and the average salary was Rs.15,000 per month. Top roles offered were doctor, nurse, and teacher. Around 85% of students got internships in our course in popular companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available in our department were labs, Wi-Fi, and a library. Hostel provided medical facilities, sports, and games. The quality of food served in the mess and canteen was good.

college_info.intro: GH Raisoni Skill Tech University Nagpur offers BTech and BBA as its flagship courses. BTech is provided in specialisations including Computer Science and Engineering, Electrical Technology and Communications, and Artificial Intelligence, among many others. BTech and BBA are offered for the duration of 4 years and 3 years. The minimum eligibility requires the candidates to pass Class 12 with PCM / PCMB from a recognised board. All the courses are recognised by UGC. Candidates can take a look below at the GH Raisoni Skill Tech University Nagpur popular programmes:

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Application (MCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Best place to start life.

content.Placements: GH Raisoni College and SkillTech University offer good placement opportunities, with an assurance that 30% to 40% of students secure jobs each year. When I enrolled, I was confident I would get a placement if I had good skills, which are essential for all colleges. The college hosts over 100 companies annually that visit for placements and provide excellent opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. It offers all-new subjects that enhance the students' learning capabilities and help them get placed. About the hostel facility, it is not available at Skill Teach University. You have to take PG rooms for living near the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Forensic Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has a great learning environment with scope for more practical exposure.

content.Placements: Our college started the B.Sc. Forensic batch from 1 year before only. Now, I am in my second year of B.Sc. Forensic.
content.Infrastructure: I love the infrastructure of our college. They provide us with free Wi-Fi on every floor. There are 2 canteens and 2 cafes, and they provide the best food. They also provide every sport, including turf for football and a big ground for cricket.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful, and they help us with every task. The semester exams are very difficult, and the papers are checked strictly. The passing is based on the student who scores more in the exam. We get cutoffs of every subject with different cutoffs, so the passing depends on the toppers. The teaching staff is the best, and the teachers teach all the theory. Mostly, they teach us practicals, and they only show us practical examples.

review_summary.college_name: BLDEACET Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and a decent campus life.

content.Placements: Almost 85% of the students were placed in our course. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest was around 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Versa Networks and Airoware. The roles offered are test engineer and software engineer. The students got internships from the companies they were selected for.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good Wi-Fi in labs, classrooms, and the library. Each department has modern labs with the latest equipment and computers. Classrooms are clean, and every class has a projector. The library has many books, journals, and computers for digital learning. Separate hostels for girls and boys are available. Every room has separate beds and fans. The hostel also has RO water and a solar theater. Wi-Fi is also provided in the hostel. There is a mess that provides good food. It also has a canteen that offers good food at reasonable prices. The college has a big ground for football and also has an indoor games room.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, better teaching faculty, a good campus environment, and good placements.

content.Placements: The Civil Engineering department has shown steady growth in placement performance over the years. For the 2023 batch, approximately 55% of students secured on-campus placements. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, which is secured by a student placed in Larsen & Toubro for a project management role. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package ranges between 4.5-5 LPA. These figures reflect the demand for skilled civil engineers in core sectors as well as emerging infrastructure domains.
content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi is provided. It has good and well-furnished infrastructure. It has a good campus environment. Food, medical, and sports facilities are good. Labs and libraries are high-tech. The hostel has good spacing rooms, solar, a good ventilated and HVAC system, and hot and cold water facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: BLDEA College of Engineering review.

content.Placements: The college had a good placement record in recent years. The highest package offered in our course is 6 LPA. The average package in our course is around 4 LPA. Top recruiters that visited our college are Reliance Construction, L&T, etc. Few students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all the required facilities and infrastructure needed for a good vocational college. A library facility is available in the college. Labs are equipped with all the essential equipment. Basic medical facilities are available in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: BLDEA’s V. P. Dr. P. G. offers quality education, good infrastructure, experienced faculty .

content.Placements: Our college has a good placement record. Almost all students are placed with good companies. Every year, the college brings in more than 30 new companies for recruitment. To be eligible for placement, a student must maintain a minimum CGPA of 7.0 throughout their engineering studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of BLDE Engineering College is vast, especially when compared to other colleges in Bijapur. The campus has a great vibe, and the canteen offers a wide variety of food options. The college has a large library that can accommodate over 500 students at a time. Each department has its own section, and all departments have their own HOD.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the placements in 2022, need to have proper well-equipped labs.

content.Placements: About 80 percent of students in the ECE department were placed before graduation with the highest package achieved being 5 LPA. Due to the recession most of the recruiting companies were service based with fewer product-based companies. Companies like Wipro TCS Infosys and IBM among others provided opportunities for students on campus.
content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities are not fully equipped, and some equipment is in poor condition. Only about 70% of the equipment is functional, requiring students to wait for their turn if the available equipment is not in working condition. The canteen and mess, however, are better and provide food that satisfies our needs.
